name: Tuna and Watercress Tapenade
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Tuna; white in oil, drained
4 Green onions, including cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tuna, mayonnaise, cream cheese, lemon juice and pepper in a processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the remaining ingredients one at a time, processing between each addition to maintain some texture.
4. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and refrigerate, covered, for at least 2 hours before serving.
5. Serve on pita chips or lavosh, or water crackers. It can also be used as a veggie dip (thinned slightly with a little milk if needed).
